name: Inventory Freedom
desc: C# game mod using Harmony postfix patching to override stack limits at runtime. 12k+ unique users, zero crashes, featured in YouTube content reaching 100k+ views. Compatible with third-party mods. Verified author on Nexus Mods.

name: TaskMaster CLI
desc: Interactive TUI task manager built in .NET 8. CRUD operations, search, sort, statistics dashboard, and JSON export. In-memory storage with file persistence.

name: Zoo Management System
desc: Console application demonstrating core OOP principles — inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation. Animal data management using dictionaries and linked lists.
